vulnerabilities.description: Direct use of superglobals without validation
vulnerabilities.remediation: Validate and sanitize all input using filter_input() or filter_var()

vulnerabilities.description: Unsanitized output of user input, vulnerable to XSS
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use htmlspecialchars() or htmlentities() to escape output, implement Content Security Policy

vulnerabilities.description: Use of weak cryptographic hash functions
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use password_hash() with PASSWORD_BCRYPT or PASSWORD_ARGON2ID

vulnerabilities.description: Hardcoded credentials or secrets in source code
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use environment variables or secure configuration files outside web root

vulnerabilities.description: File/URL access with user-controlled input, vulnerable to SSRF
vulnerabilities.remediation: Validate URLs, whitelist allowed domains, block internal network access
Configure secure session settings: httpOnly, secure flag, SameSite attribute, regenerate session ID on login
